creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/databases/sqlite gets a checksum error, if you fetch the
tarball from the mastersite. It looks like the tarball was packaged
later than the distinfo file. tarball 20.3.2001, distinfo 19.3.2001.

Fix: 

Generate a new checksum ? . Seems to compile ok with a new
checksum.
How-To-Repeat: make a fetch from the mastersite and a "make checksum".
